transition.intent: Transition to template maintenance after the multi-platform CI example, no-push review evidence, and registry-publish operator documentation gates validate.
transition.validation_command: bash -n scripts/build-config.sh scripts/build-image.sh scripts/push-image.sh scripts/validate-build-plan.sh tests/build-config.test.sh tests/build-image.test.sh tests/ci-examples.test.sh tests/validate-build-plan.test.sh && scripts/validate-build-plan.sh && bash tests/build-config.test.sh && bash tests/build-image.test.sh && bash tests/ci-examples.test.sh && bash tests/validate-build-plan.test.sh
transition.transition_validation_command: bash -n scripts/build-config.sh scripts/build-image.sh scripts/push-image.sh scripts/validate-build-plan.sh tests/build-config.test.sh tests/build-image.test.sh tests/ci-examples.test.sh tests/validate-build-plan.test.sh && scripts/validate-build-plan.sh && bash tests/build-config.test.sh && bash tests/build-image.test.sh && bash tests/ci-examples.test.sh && bash tests/validate-build-plan.test.sh
transition.decision_rule: Route phase-transition after the validation command passes; next_phase is selected because the multi-platform-release-hardening exit criteria now have CI examples, review evidence, and registry-publish operator documentation.

phase_model.purpose: Establish public-safe Docker build validation and image metadata defaults.
exit_criteria: bake plan renders and can be captured

phase_model.purpose: Document context hygiene, SBOM/provenance modes, and BuildKit secret mount guidance.
blocked_work: credential handling beyond documented template guidance

phase_model.purpose: Maintain the public Docker build template after readiness gates are complete.
blocked_work: new supply-chain scope without an explicit phase

phase_model.purpose: Harden reviewed multi-platform publish paths with CI examples, SBOM/provenance review evidence, and registry-publish operator documentation.
blocked_work: new publish automation without no-push validation evidence
exit_criteria: multi-platform publish examples preserve PUSH=false defaults unless the push wrapper is explicit
SBOM and provenance review artifacts are documented
registry-publish operator steps reference no-push validation evidence

required_gates.description: Docker build context hygiene, including .dockerignore boundaries, must be documented for public template users and enforced by no-push validation.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in context-provenance-hardening and document build context boundaries before moving to template-maintenance.

required_gates.description: SBOM, provenance, and attestation modes must be documented with safe public defaults and enforced by no-push validation.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in context-provenance-hardening and document SBOM/provenance modes before moving to template-maintenance.

required_gates.description: BuildKit secret mount guidance must exist and be enforced so credentials are not passed through build arguments, labels, or copied files.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in context-provenance-hardening and document BuildKit secret mount guidance before moving to template-maintenance.

required_gates.description: Multi-platform CI publish examples must preserve PUSH=false defaults, capture no-push review evidence, and use the validated push wrapper for registry output.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in multi-platform-release-hardening until CI examples and review artifacts preserve the no-push validation boundary.
